g.text: Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Hold the thread and go on.
Dry it and force it back.
Dry it and force it back.
Dry it and force it back.
Dry it and force it back.
Carry the page to the pivot.
Carry the page to the pivot.
Carry the page to the pivot.
Take the whole weight at once.
Keep it and hold the line.
Carry it out into the storm.
Seal it high for the morning.
Leave it for the salvage crew.
